sourceSummary.oneLine: Part approval package for BLUE_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK, part no. MKK-200101, applicable to G1717CW and G1717CWP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports customer approval and production quality control for the supplier-made part, including material list, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Part name is BLUE_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK and part no. is MKK-200101.
Applicable models are G1717CW and G1717CWP.
Revision history shows Rev.0 dated 2025.04.17 as 최초 제정.
Material list identifies MG(AZ31B) for product appearance and Non-Chromate for product surface.
Inspection criteria include appearance, dimensions, fit, weight, and handling of accepted or rejected lots.

concepts.name: Non-use certificate for restricted substances
concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK.
evidence.evidenceText: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet]; 제품명(PRODUCT NAME), BLUE_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK

evidence.claim: The applicable models are G1717CW and G1717CWP.
The material list includes MG(AZ31B) for product appearance.
The material list includes Non-Chromate for the product surface.
The material list references a non-use certificate for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The QC process flow is for mass production.
Incoming inspection checks appearance for cracks, bubbles, foreign matter, and corrosion.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사...외관,"크랙, 기포, 이물질, 부식 없을 것"

evidence.claim: Final inspection includes weight specification of 400 ± 35 g.
Product inspection uses one product as one inspection unit.
Sampling is based on full inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: 시료는 전수 검사 실시를 기준으로 한다

evidence.claim: Accepted lots are stamped as accepted during packaging.
evidence.evidenceText: 합격 처리된 LOT는 포장시 합격 도장을 날인하여 포장한다.

evidence.claim: Rejected lots follow the internal nonconforming product handling procedure.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Approval sheet number field appears present but blank.
External regulatory standards are not cited; listed standards appear to be internal inspection, process, measurement, shipment, work, and packaging documents.
